name: EcoLink Core
description: EcoLink Australia — Scope 3 Carbon Accounting Engine for Australian SMEs

telegram_commands./analyse: spend_to_carbon_analyzer — classify a batch of transactions and return CO2e totals
telegram_commands./report: report_generator — generate the latest AASB S1/S2 carbon report
telegram_commands./factors: emission_factor_lookup — search the National Greenhouse Accounts factor table
telegram_commands./sync: xero_importer — pull latest transactions from connected Xero organisation
telegram_commands./status: report_generator — show the most recent report summary
